posts.description: SocialBridge is a niche tool for multiplayer games that syncs Discord with in-game chat in real time. Players in-game and people on Discord stay in same conversation, without missing what’s happening on either side. It also adds AI analytics for chat activity, sentiment, and actionable insights, so game devs can better understand their community.

posts.name: Mithril Wallet

posts.description: Hey Product Hunt! Built this solo while working 54 hours a week at a local doner shop, coding every night until midnight to chase my Web3 dream. Mithril Wallet is a non-custodial, open-source (GPLv3) multi-chain wallet supporting 13+ Mainnet networks (BTC, Solana, Base, TON, Stellar). Built with Flutter, FastAPI & Supabase. 🎥 Full Live Mainnet Demo (5 Videos): 👉 https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLHA3QcJb1V2OcbHD2m3zPzE3KjI0Kn252&si=bnSlnUl4jG68h38e Drop a if you appreciate the grind!

posts.name: ScribeMatrix
posts.tagline: Publishing Infrastructure: Retention Engagement Monetization
posts.description: ScribeMatrix provides programmable publishing infrastructure designed to increase reader retention, deepen engagement, and unlock new monetization opportunities. The platform enables authors to transform static text into reading experiences that compete more effectively in today's Attention Economy. Unlike traditional publishing tools, ScribeMatrix allows creators to program the reader experience itself from the broadest narrative arc to individual scenes, interactions, and multimedia elements.

posts.name: AudioTap
posts.tagline: Record, transcribe and diarize calls locally on your Mac
posts.description: AudioTap is a macOS app I built for recording calls. It captures input and output audio natively and can transcribe and diarize locally. For me (a non-native English speaker) during work calls I find myself trying to understand accents and different tones of voice. So I figured a non-intrusive recorder could help me keep track of what was said. Telling people you're recording is your responsibility, consent depends on where each person is located, not where you are.

posts.name: Community Ninja Signals

posts.name: MetalBox
posts.tagline: Native GPU containers for Apple Silicon
posts.description: Every container runtime on macOS runs a Linux VM. Linux doesn't have Metal support, so you can't use MLX, MPS, or other Metal-accelerated frameworks inside a container. MetalBox solves this by running workloads as native macOS processes with Docker-like resource management: * Hard memory limits (RSS watchdog that kills and restarts processes when limits are exceeded) * Metal/MLX GPU memory caps (automatically injected via a wrapper) * Filesystem and network sandboxing using macOS sandbox-exec

posts.name: DockPops
posts.tagline: Organize and tame your dock

Customize the look and feel of the popover and dock icon. Browse files and folders, preview them with Quick Look. On-device AI suggestions, zero telemetry, one-time purchase — no subscription.

posts.name: MetalBox
posts.tagline: Native GPU containers for Apple Silicon
posts.description: Every container runtime on macOS runs a Linux VM. Linux doesn't have Metal support, so you can't use MLX, MPS, or other Metal-accelerated frameworks inside a container. MetalBox solves this by running workloads as native macOS processes with Docker-like resource management: * Hard memory limits (RSS watchdog that kills and restarts processes when limits are exceeded) * Metal/MLX GPU memory caps (automatically injected via a wrapper) * Filesystem and network sandboxing using macOS sandbox-exec
